title: Rusted Wrath (Copper Extension)
description: Make copper great again! Adds new copper ingots, armor, weapons, and a lightning-powered staff.
body:

## Added Feature
Oxidized Variant of Copper Ingot
![Oxidized Copper Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/217365cf00a10f4257c454289944707a088debd4_0.webp)

Tetanus Effect
![Tetanus Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea976e2cf49be0a0e68b49386836a2fc0e825846.png)

Oxidized Variant of Copper Armors, tools and weapon
![Oxidized Variant of Copper Armor and Tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf8c7cdbe520c017c46590299ab91e7ca1838de5_0.webp)

Special stuff (try it out yourself!)
![Special Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7182f7afd47e77fef20adce1bb33b3e1e346f994.png)
